steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “Some critics suggest that the album questions the function of sound in the world” signals the passage’s final point about critical reception.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
A matches the signal because it describes the introduction of the collaborative project, explains how the album’s approach combines spoken words with fragmented audio and music, and then notes the critics’ view that the album questions sound’s function.
The other three either introduce details not mentioned (such as biographies, a single exemplar poem, or a per‑poem collaboration breakdown) or misstate the organization.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
